rfq_respond.missing_token_body: This page expects a secure link from your RFQ email. If you copied the URL by hand, please use the original link from the email instead — the token after ?t= is required.
rfq_respond.expired_body: The link in your email may have expired or been replaced by a newer one. Please reply to the original email asking for a fresh link.
rfq_respond.submitted_banner: Your quote has been received. Thanks — the buyer will reach out if they need follow-up. You can close this page.
rfq_respond.form_subheading: Fill in either a top-line total or per-line prices below — both is fine too. All fields are optional.

admin_scrapers.title: Scraper telemetry
admin_scrapers.description: Drift trends across the provincial price-bulletin scrapers. The top of the table is what needs ops attention now.
admin_scrapers.summary_subheading: {count} slug(s) ran at least once in the window.
admin_scrapers.empty_state: No scraper runs in this window. The monthly cron may not have fired yet.
admin_scrapers.non_admin_message: Scraper telemetry is admin-only. Ask an org admin to grant access.

admin_slack_deliveries.title: Slack delivery telemetry
admin_slack_deliveries.description: Per-kind health of the platform Slack webhook. Cards in red mean every attempt failed in the window — page on-call.
admin_slack_deliveries.empty_state: No Slack delivery attempts in this window. The drift cron may not have fired yet.
admin_slack_deliveries.non_admin_message: Slack delivery telemetry is admin-only. Ask an org admin to grant access.
admin_slack_deliveries.table_empty: No attempts match the current filter.

admin_webhook_deliveries.title: Webhook delivery telemetry
admin_webhook_deliveries.description: Cross-tenant view of outbound webhook health by event type. Cards in red mean every attempt failed in the window — page on-call.
admin_webhook_deliveries.empty_state: No webhook deliveries in this window. The dispatcher cron may not have run yet.
admin_webhook_deliveries.non_admin_message: Webhook delivery telemetry is admin-only. Ask an org admin to grant access.
admin_webhook_deliveries.table_empty: No deliveries match the current filter.

admin_normalizer_rules.title: Normaliser rules
admin_normalizer_rules.description: Regex rules merged on top of the in-code material normaliser. New rules take effect on the next scrape — no redeploy needed.
admin_normalizer_rules.non_admin_message: Normaliser rules are admin-only. Ask an org admin to grant access.
admin_normalizer_rules.empty_state: No DB-backed rules yet. Click "+ New rule" to add one — the in-code rules still apply.
admin_normalizer_rules.tester_label: Test against sample material names (one per line)
admin_normalizer_rules.tester_placeholder: Paste problem material names from telemetry, one per line…
admin_normalizer_rules.tester_help: For each line, the first matching rule wins (server uses the same priority order). Lines with no match are flagged below — those are the ones that need a new rule.
admin_normalizer_rules.confirm_delete: Delete the rule for {code}? Soft-disable (toggle Off) is usually safer.
admin_normalizer_rules.field_pattern_hint: Validated server-side via re.compile — typos return a 400 with the exact error.
admin_normalizer_rules.field_priority_hint: Lower runs first. Defaults to 50; in-code rules sit above this.

settings_notifications.title: Notifications
settings_notifications.description: Pick the alerts you want to receive over email or Slack. Settings apply to the current organisation.
settings_notifications.slack_tooltip: An admin sets OPS_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL to enable the Slack channel

scraper_drift.title: Price drift alerts
scraper_drift.description: Email me when the unmatched-material ratio spikes — an early signal that the Department of Construction has renamed something.

rfq_deadline_summary.title: RFQ deadline digest
rfq_deadline_summary.description: Daily roll-up of RFQs nearing their deadline plus suppliers who haven't responded.

weekly_digest_email.title: Weekly digest
weekly_digest_email.description: Activity summary across the projects you watch.

footer.tagline: An AEC platform built for Vietnam.

hero.title: Run construction projects from proposal to handover — on one platform.
hero.subtitle: AEC Platform brings 14 purpose-built modules for the architecture, engineering, and construction industry into one place: proposals, bidding, the site, safety, handover, and more. AI-native, bilingual, ready for teams in Vietnam.

modules.title: 14 modules, one platform
modules.subtitle: Organised by project lifecycle — pick what fits your team's stage today, scale into the rest as you grow.

pre.title: Pre-construction
pre.subtitle: From finding the work to signing the contract.

live.title: On site
live.subtitle: Track progress, schedule, and safety in real time.

close.title: Close-out & operate
close.subtitle: Handover, punch lists, change orders, and code compliance.

winwork.name: WinWork
winwork.tagline: Proposals, fee estimates, and win-rate analytics.

bidradar.name: BidRadar
bidradar.tagline: Track public tenders and new opportunities daily.

costpulse.name: CostPulse
costpulse.tagline: Live materials pricing, alerts, and rapid take-offs.

drawbridge.name: Drawbridge
drawbridge.tagline: Drawing management, RFIs, and cross-discipline coordination.

pulse.name: Pulse
pulse.tagline: Project pulse — schedule, budget, and risk at a glance.

siteeye.name: SiteEye
siteeye.tagline: AI camera analytics for PPE compliance and site safety.

schedulepilot.name: SchedulePilot
schedulepilot.tagline: Schedules, critical path, and what-if delay simulations.

submittals.name: Submittals
submittals.tagline: Approval workflows for materials, samples, and inspections.

dailylog.name: DailyLog
dailylog.tagline: Site diaries with photos, GPS, and one-click PDF export.

handover.name: Handover
handover.tagline: Closeout package, warranties, and ops documentation.

punchlist.name: Punchlist
punchlist.tagline: Defect lists tracked from open to closed.

changeorder.name: ChangeOrder
changeorder.tagline: Change orders, approvals, and cost impact tracking.

codeguard.name: CodeGuard
codeguard.tagline: AI assistant that answers QCVN/TCVN questions in your design tool.

local.title: Built for Vietnam
local.body: Native QCVN/TCVN workflows, Vietnamese document templates, VND-first pricing, and project-level RBAC.

ai.title: AI as a teammate, not a feature
ai.body: An assistant with full project context drafts proposals, checks code compliance, and triages site photos.

open.title: Open and integrable
open.body: APIs, webhooks, and clean exports plug into accounting, ERP, and BIM tools you already use.

cta.title: Ready to try it on a real project?
cta.subtitle: Free trial in 2 minutes. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

pricing.title: Simple per-user pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay monthly, no long-term lock-in. Every plan includes all 14 modules.

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: Small teams, your first project on the platform.

growth.name: Growth
growth.tagline: Growing firms running multiple concurrent projects.

pricing.footer_note: Public-sector or specialised use case? <contact>Talk to sales</contact> for a tailored plan.

about.title: Who we are
about.subtitle: A small team that believes construction software for Vietnam should be built in Vietnam, for Vietnamese teams.

story.p1: AEC Platform started from a simple question: why are construction teams in Vietnam still stitching together Excel, Zalo, and five disconnected tools to run a project?
story.p2: We built 14 modules on a single platform, connected by shared data and an AI assistant that understands the project context.
story.p3: The product is early, but the philosophy is clear: prioritise Vietnamese users, stay open to integrate, let AI take the repetitive work.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.body: Questions, feedback, or partnerships — drop us a line.

hub.title: Developer docs
hub.intro: Reference for partner integrations: REST API, webhooks, ops surface. Public on purpose — read these before signing up to evaluate whether the platform fits your stack.
hub.manage_keys_hint: Have an API key already? Manage them at /settings/api-keys (admin-only). For typed clients, the auto-generated TypeScript SDK lives at @aec/sdk.

api.title: API reference
api.description: Authenticate via API keys, send authenticated requests, handle rate limits and errors. Code samples in curl + Python + TypeScript. Includes the sandbox-mode walkthrough.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Subscribe to platform events. HMAC-SHA256 signing, retry schedule, replay protection, dead-letter handling.

events.title: Event catalog
events.description: Every webhook event the platform emits, grouped by source module. Each event has a description and an illustrative payload sample.

ops.title: Operations
ops.description: Health probes (/healthz, /readyz), Prometheus scrape config (/metrics), example k8s manifests, alert rules.

events.title: Event catalog
events.intro: Every webhook event the platform emits, grouped by source module. Each card lists the event type, when it fires, and an illustrative payload sample.
events.count: {events} events across {modules} module(s). Sample payloads show the fields you can rely on; additional fields may appear (best-effort) and may change between releases.
events.unreachable: Catalog is currently unreachable. The full list lives in services/webhooks.py::EVENT_CATALOG on the source repo.

translation_notice.title: English translation in progress
translation_notice.body: This page is currently Vietnamese-canonical. The English translation is being rolled out incrementally — headers and side-text are translated, but the body content is still in the original Vietnamese. Email hello@aec-platform.vn if you need a complete English reference today.

confirm.title: Check your email
confirm.body: We just sent a confirmation link to <email></email>. Open it and come back here to sign in.
